title: Shikha Mukerjee | Bengal’s 5-year Thriller: Didi Faces Biggest Test?
description: They split out into the streets, outraged by a horrifying attack on a junior doctor raped and murdered inside a state-run hospital, that made prime-time news in India and globally. There was a football mess over Lionel Messi’s Kolkata visit. The Durga Puja, contrary to the BJP propaganda that its celebration was obstructed by Mamata Banerjee, acquired Unesco’s Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity tag and became a money-spinner
